home.title: Choose Style
home.subtitle: Pick a style, upload a selfie, get 6 stickers

3dCartoon.name: 3D Cartoon
3dCartoon.desc: Adorable 3D characters with big expressive eyes

animeKawaii.name: Anime Kawaii
animeKawaii.desc: Japanese anime style with sparkly eyes

watercolor.name: Watercolor
watercolor.desc: Gentle watercolor with dreamy pastel vibes

popArt.name: Pop Art
popArt.desc: Bold comic book style with halftone dots

minimalLine.name: Minimal Line
minimalLine.desc: Clean single-line art with elegant simplicity

preview.infoDownload: Save to Photos or share directly

upload.title: Your selfie
upload.subtitle: Use a clear, well-lit photo of your face
upload.tip4: Face fills most of the frame
upload.cameraMsg: Please allow camera access in Settings to take a selfie.
upload.cameraUnavailableMsg: Camera is not available on this device. Please choose a photo from your library instead.
upload.photosMsg: Please allow Photos access in Settings to choose a photo.

processing.title: Creating your stickers…
processing.subtitle: Sit tight, AI is drawing you...
processing.errorNoImage: No image selected. Please go back and choose a photo.
processing.errorFailed: Sticker generation failed. Please try again.
processing.errorTimeout: Generation timed out. Please try again.

result.title: Your stickers are ready!
result.subtitle: Tap any sticker to share it directly
result.saveErrorMsg: Some stickers could not be saved. Please try again.
result.shareUnavailableMsg: Sharing is not available on this device.
result.permissionMsg: Please allow Photos access in Settings to save stickers.
result.loadErrorMsg: Failed to load your stickers. Please try again.
result.emptyMsg: Generation may have failed. Please try again.

pricing.title: Choose your pack
pricing.subtitle: One-time purchase • No subscription • Yours forever
pricing.featureDownload: Save to Photos or share directly
pricing.legal: Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account. This is a one-time purchase, not a subscription.
pricing.noRestoreMsg: No previous purchases were found for this Apple ID.
pricing.restoreErrorMsg: Could not restore purchases. Please try again.

success.title: Stickers saved!
success.subtitle:
